# Project Memory (VerifiedState)

This file is auto-updated every 5 minutes from VerifiedState memory.
The full current state is in `.claude/hot-context.md`.

When working on this project:

- Always check `.claude/hot-context.md` for current state, recent decisions, and open loops
- Query VerifiedState memory tools (`memory_query`, `working_state_get`) when historical context might exist
- The behavioral guidelines and project state in hot-context.md are binding
- Treat decisions in hot-context.md as binding unless explicitly reversed

## Quick reference

- **Working state:** `.claude/hot-context.md`
- **MCP tools:** Available via `mcp.verifiedstate.ai` (configured in `.mcp.json`)
- **Dashboard:** https://verifiedstate.ai/dashboard
- **Uninstall:** `npx @verifiedstate/vsync eject`
